name: @refarm.dev/pi-agent
description: pi-agent — WASM plugin compiled from Rust via cargo-component

scripts.build:wasm: RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=stable cargo component build --target wasm32-wasip1 --release && mkdir -p dist && cp $(node ../../scripts/ci/cargo-artifact-path.mjs wasm32-wasip1/release/pi_agent.wasm) dist/pi_agent.wasm
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:jco
scripts.test:integration: echo 'No integration tests for this crate'
